Package net.mcreator.plugin.events.workspace

package net.mcreator.plugin.events.workspace
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    net.mcreator.plugin.events
     
    net.mcreator.plugin.events.ui
     
  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    MCreatorLoadedEvent
     
    WorkspaceBuildStartedEvent
     
    WorkspaceRefactoringEvent
     
    WorkspaceSavedEvent
     
    WorkspaceSavedEvent.AfterSaving
    This event is called when MCreator started the process of saving a workspace and it detected the workspace can and should be saved.
    WorkspaceSavedEvent.BeforeSaving
    This event is called when MCreator started the process of saving a workspace and it detected the workspace can and should be saved.
    WorkspaceSavedEvent.CalledSavingMethod
    It is called every time the method to save the workspace is called.
    WorkspaceTaskFinishedEvent
    This is a class grouping different MCREvent related to Gradle tasks that are triggered once a task is finished.
    WorkspaceTaskFinishedEvent.TaskCompleted
    MCreator triggers this event when it completes a task, meaning it is executed after the result of the task is known.
    WorkspaceTaskFinishedEvent.TaskError
    This event is only triggered when the task fails due to any type of error.
    WorkspaceTaskFinishedEvent.TaskSuccessful
    This event is only triggered when the task succeed.
